content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33089 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
The issue HEAL-33089 has been assigned to me. I’m taking a look now and will keep you updated as I make progress.
Let me know if there’s any additional context that might help.
Thank you Sean as of right now that's all I have

Can we get an update or let us know if this will not be able to be processed?
Can we get an update on this ticket?
Do we have an update on this?

I found the Salesforce logs for this Lab Order. Salesforce did send the order to Novogenia and received a successful-looking response with a Novogenia order number, but Salesforce then hit a parsing error before it could save that order number back to the Lab Order.
I have escalated and have asked for an update. Please do not resubmit this order yet, because Novogenia may already have an order for it and I want to avoid a duplicate.

items.fromString:
Hello for this pt on SF it is showing error message “Error parsing Novogenia response. The Lab Order was not updated from the response from Novogenia. this is for Precision supplements 

Stack Trace

Class.gt_Callouts.submitOrder: line 84, column 1
Class.gt_SubmitOrder.gt_SubmitOrder: line 466, column 1” 

what does that mean?

h3.
